assertionResults.fullName: mutationWorker contract turns retryable sync failures into retry_scheduled queue state
assertionResults.title: turns retryable sync failures into retry_scheduled queue state

assertionResults.fullName: mutationWorker contract turns exhausted retries into failed_non_retryable terminal state
assertionResults.title: turns exhausted retries into failed_non_retryable terminal state

assertionResults.fullName: mutationWorker contract turns stale/conflict failures into conflicted queue state
assertionResults.title: turns stale/conflict failures into conflicted queue state

assertionResults.fullName: mutationWorker contract restores stuck processing mutations before retrying them through the worker
assertionResults.title: restores stuck processing mutations before retrying them through the worker

assertionResults.fullName: mutationWorker contract removes completed mutations from active processing and does not reprocess them on the next flush
assertionResults.title: removes completed mutations from active processing and does not reprocess them on the next flush

assertionResults.fullName: mutationQueue contract collapses exact duplicate mutations by dedupeKey and keeps the latest payload intent
assertionResults.title: collapses exact duplicate mutations by dedupeKey and keeps the latest payload intent

assertionResults.fullName: mutationQueue contract coalesces compatible pending mutations into a single queued intent
assertionResults.title: coalesces compatible pending mutations into a single queued intent

assertionResults.fullName: mutationQueue contract lets a terminal mutation absorb obsolete pending draft intent without losing the last valid action
assertionResults.title: lets a terminal mutation absorb obsolete pending draft intent without losing the last valid action

assertionResults.fullName: mutationQueue contract restores stuck inflight mutations back to queued and emits recovery telemetry
assertionResults.title: restores stuck inflight mutations back to queued and emits recovery telemetry

assertionResults.fullName: mutationQueue contract respects retry scheduling but lets network_back recover network-unreachable retries immediately
assertionResults.title: respects retry scheduling but lets network_back recover network-unreachable retries immediately

assertionResults.fullName: mutationQueue contract prunes terminal history to the newest 20 entries without corrupting active queue truth
assertionResults.title: prunes terminal history to the newest 20 entries without corrupting active queue truth
